caption:
This is a must-try izakaya if you’re in Umeda, Osaka! 🍢🍺

📍 Location
Taishu Sakaba Manma Higashidori
1-14 Doyamacho, Kita Ward, Osaka, 530-0027
Higashidori area, Umeda

🕒 Hours
Mon–Thu, Sun & Holidays:
12:00 PM – 1:00 AM
(Last order: Food 11:00 PM / Drinks 11:30 PM)

Fri–Sat:
12:00 PM – 4:00 AM
(Last order: Food 3:00 AM / Drinks 3:30 AM)

💰 Budget
¥2,000–3,000 per person
($13–20 USD)

#osaka #umeda #izakaya #kushikatsu #sashimi #takoyaki #horsesashimi #osakafood #japantrip #localvibes #asukunavi #pr
transcript: What's the best restaurant in Osaka? Best restaurant? What's the best restaurant in Osaka? Oh, Manma! Why? Osaka's famous and sashimi are so delicious! Okay, let's go! This is a must-visit izakaya in Osaka. It's located in the local drinking district, Umeida. Manma is a local izakaya known for its nostalgic Japanese atmosphere. They offer a wide range of dishes, including Osaka's classic favorite. Kushikatsu. Light, crispy, and perfectly coated with their sweet signature sauce. Their sashimi is another highlight. Super fresh and full of flavor. And don't miss their host sashimi. It may sound unusual at first, but one bite and you'll be hooked. This is a must-try when you're in Osaka. Your local food guide, available at...
